setupSequence.label: Environment configuration
setupSequence.detail: This step can be re-run safely because it only inspects injected config.
setupSequence.remediation: Inject the warehouse, governance catalog, and governance schema before marking the runtime ready.

setupSequence.label: Runtime probe
setupSequence.summary: The live metadata runtime probe has been evaluated.
setupSequence.evidence: Runtime health is derived from the live SQL metadata probe.

setupSequence.label: Governance store probe
setupSequence.summary: The governance control-plane probe has been evaluated.
setupSequence.evidence: Governance store reachability is derived from the control-plane probe.

setupSequence.label: App service-principal probe
setupSequence.summary: The app service principal can reach the warehouse and governance store.
setupSequence.evidence: runtime=available, store=available, config=present, clientAuthMode=oauth-m2m-env, clientAuthType=oauth-m2m, host=present

setupSequence.label: Identity and authorization probe
setupSequence.summary: A forwarded Databricks user identity is present.
setupSequence.evidence: A forwarded Databricks user identity header is present.

setupSequence.label: Capability inventory
setupSequence.summary: Workspace capability inventory has been evaluated.
setupSequence.detail: Capability gates remain read-only and truthful.
setupSequence.evidence: Capability truth is sourced from the runtime probes and is not inferred from empty payloads.
setupSequence.remediation: Keep capability-gated surfaces hidden or explicitly degraded until the workspace probes prove them available.

setupSequence.label: Rollout controls
setupSequence.summary: Workspace setup diagnostics rollout control is available.
setupSequence.detail: The setup surface can be reopened without mutating any backend state.
setupSequence.evidence: Rollout control truth is sourced from the runtime configuration only.

gates.label: Background work runner
gates.reason: A managed background work runner is not implemented in the live runtime yet.
gates.proofSource: No Databricks Job-backed runner or durable job registry is configured in the current runtime.
gates.remediation: Add a managed background work runner before enabling async exports, corpus rebuilds, notification fanout, or scheduled quality work.

gates.label: Classification recommendation source eligibility
gates.reason: Databricks classification recommendations are not enabled as a general runtime source yet.
gates.proofSource: Databricks classification results are preview/admin-governed, may include sampled evidence, and require serverless and permission prerequisites.
gates.remediation: Keep classification ingestion operator-only until redaction, permission checks, and recommendation acceptance flows are implemented.

gates.label: Transaction eligibility
gates.reason: Portable fallback-only mutation ordering is the active mode.
gates.proofSource: Install/setup has not validated transaction support for the target governance tables.
gates.remediation: Treat idempotent fallback ordering as the default until transaction eligibility is proven in the target workspace.

featureFlags.label: Workspace setup diagnostics
featureFlags.detail: Read-only setup and diagnostics baseline surfaced in the shell-owned operator view.

featureFlags.rolloutPolicy: Always available to operators while diagnostics are enabled.
featureFlags.expiresAfter: Before a dedicated admin diagnostics surface replaces the shell-owned setup view.
featureFlags.rollback: Hide the diagnostics surface while preserving /api/runtime/status for operator probes.
